# Subcontractor Mobilization and Coordination Management: Sequencing Electrical and HVAC Subcontractor Entry and Managing Resource Allocation

## 适用受众
Site_Supervisor

## 写作角度说明
分包商进场与协调管理是现场主管调配多工种施工资源的核心工作。电气、HVAC等专业分包商需要在正确的时间节点进场，过早进场会造成窝工和返工，过晚进场会造成整体工期延误。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Mobilizing the electrical subcontractor before the structural trades have completed anchor placement — on the assumption that conduit routing "can be done simultaneously" — creates physical conflicts that require expensive rework to resolve.

## 参考素材
- Mobilization trigger: electrical contractor mobilizes after structural completion and anchor placement verified → HVAC contractor mobilizes after equipment placement confirmed → controls contractor mobilizes after electrical rough-in verified
- Resource allocation: maximum concurrent trades per zone (typically 2 trades per room to avoid congestion), stagger mobilizations to match physical progress
- Coordination frequency: daily coordination meeting (15 minutes) between site supervisor and all active subcontractors, weekly formal coordination meeting with foremen
- Site rules:统一出入口和行走路线 → 统一工具存放区 → 统一材料堆放区 → 统一垃圾清理时间表
- Conflict resolution: when two trades require access to the same zone simultaneously, escalate to site supervisor for sequencing decision, never allow informal "I'll just work around them"

## 关键词
Subcontractor Mobilization, Resource Coordination, Trade Sequencing, Site Management, Work Zone Coordination, Subcontractor Scheduling
